title: Fix BEM Names
description: Fix incorrectly named BEM classes in a component.
hint: Check: elements use __, modifiers use --, no element-of-element.

title: Convert to BEM
description: Convert flat CSS classes to proper BEM naming.
hint: Identify blocks, elements within blocks, and modifier variants.

title: Extract Independent Block
description: Extract a nested element that has grown too complex into its own block.
hint: If .card__form has many elements, it should become .form block.

title: BEM and Preprocessor Nesting
description: Rewrite CSS using BEM with Sass & nesting for cleaner code.

title: Migrate Project to BEM
description: Plan and execute migrating a non-BEM project to BEM methodology.
hint: Phase migration: 1) Audit 2) Block identification 3) Element mapping 4) CSS rewrite 5) HTML update.
solution: Create migration plan with component inventory, mapping old classes to new BEM names, phased rollout.
